name: ah
notes: high byte of ax (not accessible with REX prefix)

name: eax
notes: low dword of rax; writing zeros upper 32 bits

name: bh
notes: high byte of bx (not accessible with REX prefix)

name: ebx
notes: low dword of rbx; writing zeros upper 32 bits

name: cl
notes: low byte of rcx; implicit shift count

name: ch
notes: high byte of cx (not accessible with REX prefix)

name: ecx
notes: low dword of rcx; writing zeros upper 32 bits

name: rcx
notes: 4th integer argument (SysV ABI) / implicit shift count

name: dh
notes: high byte of dx (not accessible with REX prefix)

name: edx
notes: low dword of rdx; writing zeros upper 32 bits

name: rdx
notes: 3rd integer argument / high half of mul/div result

name: esi
notes: low dword of rsi; writing zeros upper 32 bits

name: edi
notes: low dword of rdi; writing zeros upper 32 bits

name: esp
notes: low dword of rsp; writing zeros upper 32 bits

name: ebp
notes: low dword of rbp; writing zeros upper 32 bits

name: r8d
notes: low dword of r8; writing zeros upper 32 bits

name: r9d
notes: low dword of r9; writing zeros upper 32 bits

name: r10d
notes: low dword of r10; writing zeros upper 32 bits

name: r10
notes: caller-saved; used as static chain pointer in some ABIs

name: r11d
notes: low dword of r11; writing zeros upper 32 bits

name: r12d
notes: low dword of r12; writing zeros upper 32 bits

name: r13d
notes: low dword of r13; writing zeros upper 32 bits

name: r14d
notes: low dword of r14; writing zeros upper 32 bits

name: r15d
notes: low dword of r15; writing zeros upper 32 bits

name: rip
notes: instruction pointer; read-only; used in RIP-relative addressing

name: rflags
notes: flags register; not a general-purpose register

name: xmm0
notes: SSE/AVX register; 1st FP/vector argument and return

name: ymm0
notes: AVX 256-bit register; lower 128 bits alias xmm0

name: ymm1
notes: AVX 256-bit register; lower 128 bits alias xmm1
